tools.name: get_employees_leave-balance
tools.description: Returns the current leave balance for an employee - id (path, required): Employee ID (e.g., E101, E102) Response: { employee_id, total_leaves, used_leaves, remaining_leaves }

tools.name: create_employees_leave-request
tools.description: Submit a new leave request - id (path, required): Employee ID - start_date (body, required): Leave start date (YYYY-MM-DD) - end_date (body, required): Leave end date (YYYY-MM-DD) - reason (body, optional): Reason for leave Response: { request_id, status, message }

tools.name: get_employees_payroll
tools.description: Get payroll information for an employee - id (path, required): Employee ID Response: { employee_id, salary, bonus, deductions, net_pay }

tools.name: create_hr_tickets
tools.description: Create a new HR support ticket - employee_id (body, required): Employee ID - category (body, required): Ticket category - description (body, required): Issue description Response: { ticket_id, status, created_at }
